creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> with your recent patch, I get this now===>  Extracting for lame-gtk-3.89b
>  >> Checksum OK for lame3.89beta.tar.gz.
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on executable: nasm - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on executable: gmake - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on executable: libtool - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on shared library: vorbis.0 - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on shared library: glib12.3 - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on shared library: gtk12.2 - found
> ===>   lame-gtk-3.89b depends on: /usr/ports/audio/libvorbis
> ===>    Verifying extract for /usr/ports/audio/libvorbis
> ===>  Extracting for libvorbis-1.0.r2,2
>  >> Checksum OK for libvorbis-1.0rc2.tar.gz.
> ===>   libvorbis-1.0.r2,2 depends on executable: libtool - found
> ===>   libvorbis-1.0.r2,2 depends on shared library: ogg.2 - found
> ===>   Returning to build of lame-gtk-3.89b
> ===>  Patching for lame-gtk-3.89b
> ===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for lame-gtk-3.89b
> File to patch:

in France, we have a saying, never two without three.
that made two ;^)

Description
[snip]
	files/patch-*
		deleted.

Cyrille.
--
